info.title: AckAgent Protocol Types
info.description:
Type definitions for the AckAgent signing protocol. These types define the structure
of encrypted request and response payloads exchanged between requesters and approver
devices.

All payloads are encrypted end-to-end using P-256 ECDH key exchange and ChaCha20-Poly1305.
The relay service cannot read the contents of these payloads.

This master file aggregates all protocol types from modular component files.

AckAgent.Common.AttestationSecurityType.description: Combined platform and security level for attestation.

@context.description: JSON-LD context array for VC/Data Integrity semantics.

AckAgent.Common.AnonymousAttestation.description: Anonymous attestation envelope using W3C Data Integrity (`bbs-2023`). Proves the response came from a genuine device with a valid credential from a known issuer without revealing device identity. Travels inside the encrypted response blob so the relay stays completely blind.

AckAgent.Common.KeyPurpose.description: Purpose of the key being enrolled.

AckAgent.Common.TransactionType.description: Type of signing or approval request.

url.description: Full URL of the page initiating the request.

BrowserMetadata.description: Browser metadata captured for web approval requests.

approved.description: Whether the user approved the captcha.

display.description: Required display schema for custom payloads.

proofValue.description: Serialized BBS+ proof value. Canonical format is multibase base64url (prefix `u`), with URL-safe/base64 compatibility accepted during migration.

AckAgent.Common.DataIntegrityProof.description: W3C Data Integrity proof object for bbs-2023 presentations.

expiresAt.description: Credential expiry as Unix epoch seconds.

AckAgent.Common.AnonymousAttestationReve.description: Messages disclosed by the BBS+ selective disclosure proof. These are the only credential attributes visible to the verifier.

scopeId.description: Scope identifier (for example relying-party ID or organization ID).

AckAgent.Common.AnonymousAttestationScop.description: Optional scoped-linking metadata for cross-device experiments.

pseudonym.description: Scope-bound pseudonym (48 bytes compressed G1 point, base64). Deterministically derived from the holder's nym secret and the scope. Same secret + same scope = same pseudonym (enables replay detection). Different scopes produce unrelated pseudonyms (prevents cross-request correlation).

scope.description: Scope used for pseudonym derivation (request ID). Per-request pseudonyms provide maximum privacy.

presentationHeader.description: Presentation header bound to the proof (base64). Provides freshness binding to the specific request.

issuerPublicKeyId.description: Unique identifier of the issuer key that signed the prover's credential. Enables verifiers to look up the correct key for proof verification during key rotation.

AckAgent.Common.AnonymousAttestationPayl.description: AckAgent-specific payload inside the W3C envelope.

publicKeyHex.description: Lowercase hex-encoded public key being attested (66 hex chars for P-256 33-byte key, or 64 hex chars for Ed25519 32-byte key).

assertion.description: App Attest assertion or software signature (base64)

attestationObject.description: Apple CBOR attestation object for hardware attestation (base64)

attestationPublicKeyHex.description: Lowercase hex-encoded attestation key's public key (66 hex chars for P-256 33-byte compressed key).

AckAgent.Common.KeyMetadataAttestation.description: Attestation proof that a key was created on attested device hardware.
